3306350.name: I am Customer Support.
3306350.description:
You (Masato Kasuta) were kicked out of the company dormitory due to restructuring,

and since you had no choice, you moved into a cheap rental apartment for the time being.

While browsing the Internet while receiving unemployment benefits, I found an advertisement that said.

”

"Mail order site: ByonByon  Customer support wanted!  Start now from home!"

”

"Customer support... I think someone said late at night is relatively free...”

So you (Masato Kasuta), who joined the company as a part-time worker for the time being, decided to experience the business for five days...

Game Flow:

  • Listen to the customer's problems

  • Ask questions and make suggestions

  • Decide on an appropriate response

Game Features:

  • In-game PC control

  • Multiple endings

  • Some complaints based on true stories appeared

  • Parody, Respect
